description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring a modern and inviting design. The seating area is generously cushioned, with a tufted seat on the chaise section and three large, plush backrest cushions along the main segment. Four rectangular accent pillows in a contrasting taupe color add both comfort and visual interest. The sofa has straight, padded armrests at both ends, and stands on slim, black metal legs that elevate it slightly off the ground. The overall silhouette is clean and contemporary, with soft, rounded edges and a uniform, smooth upholstery texture. This piece is suitable for spacious urban interiors, such as lofts, lobbies, or upscale waiting areas.
description: A large, L-shaped beige sectional sofa with tufted seating, plush back and accent cushions, and slim black metal legs. The design is modern, comfortable, and visually inviting.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shaped layout, tufted chaise, and arrangement of all cushions and pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight armrest, seat depth, and the thickness of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniformity of the sofa's back profile.
description_view_3: Side view of the chaise section, showing the tufted seat, accent pillows, and the sofa's length.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose backrest cushions along the main segment, one large tufted seat cushion on the chaise, and four rectangular accent pillows; cushions are uniform in size and arranged for sectional seating.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at both ends, matching the sofa's height and covered in the same beige fabric, with a simple, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slim, black metal legs positioned at the corners and midpoints for support; legs are straight, exposed, and have a minimalist, modern appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with three large, loose cushions; the backrest is straight and uniform, providing ample support without tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish; the chaise section features subtle tufting, while the rest of the upholstery is plain and unpatterned.
